title: Encapsulation, Properties, and Descriptors · Mastery Check
summary: Protect borrower limits, item status, and identifier rules while keeping a small usable public API. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for an invariant-protecting circulation model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use public APIs, leading-underscore conventions, and name mangling according to collaboration and subclass risks.
Use properties to preserve attribute-like access when validation, computation, compatibility, or read-only behavior is needed.
Keep validation and invariants consistent across constructor, property setter, methods, deserialization, and copying paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
